title: Razorpay UPI Circle Instrument
description: Handler-level wrapper for the upi_circle instrument type used with com.razorpay.upi.circle. Extends the base UPI Circle instrument schema and defines the available_upi_circle_instrument declaration for use in handler available_instruments. NPCI limits apply: ₹5,000 per transaction, ₹15,000 per month per UPI Circle link.

available_upi_circle_instrument.title: Available UPI Circle Instrument
available_upi_circle_instrument.description: Declares support for the UPI Circle flow in handler available_instruments. The secondary user must have an active UPI Circle delegation from a primary account holder via their PSP.
